parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vector: $json.embedding || [], limit: 3, with_payload: true, with_vectors: false, score_threshold: 0.65 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.swarmTier, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a helpful AI assistant running inside a private, local-only stack. Answer accurately and concisely.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.enrichedTask }], stream: false, max_tokens: $json.complexity === 'tiny' ? 512 : $json.complexity === 'medium' ? 2048 : 8192 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ points: [{ id: $('Normalize Response').first().json.taskId, vector: $json.embedding || [], payload: { task: $('Normalize Response').first().json.task, result: $('Normalize Response').first().json.result.substring(0, 2000), agent: $('Normalize Response').first().json.agent, model: $('Normalize Response').first().json.model, complexity: $('Normalize Response').first().json.complexity, memory_used: $('Normalize Response').first().json.memoryUsed, timestamp: $('Normalize Response').first().json.timestamp, completed_at: $('Normalize Response').first().json.completed_at, source: 'swarm-coordinator-v3' } }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ taskId: $('Normalize Response').first().json.taskId, agent: $('Normalize Response').first().json.agent, model: $('Normalize Response').first().json.model, complexity: $('Normalize Response').first().json.complexity, memory_used: $('Normalize Response').first().json.memoryUsed, memory_count: $('Normalize Response').first().json.memoryCount, result: $('Normalize Response').first().json.result, timestamp: $('Normalize Response').first().json.completed_at }) }}
